rationale.fidelity: Preserves the original decisions, constraints, cost objective, feasible integer set, and role of valid inequalities.
rationale.managerial_framing: Directly states why computation can matter and enumerates the missing action pathways, though the actor-level trade-off is somewhat implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No literature positioning is requested or claimed, and the computational result is narrowly characterized.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Confines the benchmark evidence to faster solution of supplied instances and rejects optimal-cost and profit extrapolations.
rationale.prose_clarity: Concise, cohesive, and precise aside from one garbled dash sequence.
rationale.overall: An excellent bounded framing that cleanly separates computational evidence from managerial value.
